title: Nakia Bahadir
content:
{{Character |image = Nakia Bahadir - Profile.png |real name = Nakia Bahadir |alias = {{Alias |derivatives = Naks{{Ref|MM102}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}}
{{Citizenship|LEBN}}[https://www.popsugar.co.uk/entertainment/yasmeen-fletcher-ms-marvel-interview-48859538 Yasmeen Fletcher on Bringing "Ms. Marvel"'s Nakia to Life] |gender = Female |DOB = [[2008]]–[[2009]]{{Ref|MMScreenRant}} |snapped = No{{Ref|MMScreenRant}} |title = Islamic Masjid of Jersey City Board Member |affiliation = [[Coles Academic High School]]
[[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City]] |movie = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[The Marvels]]'' (photo & mentioned)}}}} |tv series = ''[[Ms. Marvel (TV series)|Ms. Marvel]]'' (4 episodes) |actor = [[Yasmeen Fletcher]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|My whole life I've either been too white for some people or too ethnic for others. And it's been this very uncomfortable, sucky, in-between. So, when I first put this on, I was hoping to shut some people up, but I kinda realized I don't really need to prove anything to anybody. Like, when I put this on, I feel like me. Like, I have a purpose.|Nakia Bahadir to [[Kamala Khan]]|Crushed}} '''Nakia Bahadir''' is a student at [[Coles Academic High School]] and one of [[Kamala Khan]]'s best friends. Torn between her [[United States of America|American]] lifestyle and her Muslim beliefs, she decided to run to become a board member of the [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City]] and convey progressive ideas, which she succeeded, defending the mosque against the disrespectful incursions of the [[United States Department of Damage Control]]. Initially ignoring that Khan was the newly appeared superhero in [[Jersey City]], Bahadir was wary of her actions, considering that it drew too much unwanted attention onto the local Muslim community. Despite being upset upon discovering the truth, she and Khan were able to reconcile, and Bahadir helped Khan fight against Damage Control to protect [[Kamran]]. ==Biography== {{MD|Nakia Bahadir (Earth-199999)}} ===High School Student=== ====Early Life==== Bahadir befriended [[Kamala Khan]] in their early school years. Bahadir attended classes at [[Coles Academic High School]], where she became good friends with [[Bruno Carrelli]].{{Ref|MM101}} In [[2018]], Bahadir survived the [[Snap]].{{Ref|MMScreenRant}}{{Ref|MM102}} ====Placing Bets==== {{Quote|I'm sorry. I really do love you.|Nakia Bahadir to [[Kamala Khan]]|Crushed}} As Khan had to undergo an exam to get her driving license, Bahadir, despite her friendship to Khan, had a bet with Carrelli in which she assumed that Khan would fail, which effectively happened. As she encountered Khan and Carrelli in the next day at school, she collected her money from Carrelli, but assured Khan that she still loved her. Upon making their way to class, the trio had an awkward encounter with classmate [[Zoe Zimmer]], with Bahadir expressing annoyance regarding her since she found Zimmer unbearable due to her personality shift after she gained online popularity. Later, during physical education session, Bahadir accused Zimmer of having thrown a ball at Kamala's face on purpose, although Zimmer denied. Back in the locker room, Bahadir gave Khan some ice to ease her pain.{{Ref|MM101}} [[File:Ms. Marvel - 1x02 - Photography - Nakia, Bruno and Kamala.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir listens to [[Zoe Zimmer]]'s story]] After the [[New Jersey AvengerCon]], Bahadir met with Khan and Carrelli at school, and they were annoyed upon hearing Zimmer recounting her encounter with the future [[Ms. Marvel]] and announcing that she would throw out a party to celebrate. Although initially not attending to go, Bahadir smiled when Khan declared that they should go to the party after hearing that [[Kamran]] would attend as well.{{Ref|MM102}} ====Issues at the Masjid==== [[File:Kamala Khan & Nakia Bahadir.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir considers being a [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City|mosque]] board member]] {{Quote|They really gotta fix [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City|this place]]."
"Uh, no, you mean they gotta fix our section of this place. See, but the men's section is pristine. We got mold under the carpets and the walls are literally crumbling. We can't just stick up a poster for every piece of plaster that falls.|[[Kamala Khan]] and Nakia Bahadir|Crushed}} Along with [[Kamala Khan]], Bahadir went to attend a lecture by [[Abdullah]] at the [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City]], although they were running late. As they made their ablution, Bahadir complained that her faucet did not work, forcing her to use Khan's instead. During the praying, both girls kept complaining about how the women's section of the mosque was in a sorry state, which they felt was unfair, until they were reprimanded by Abdullah for talking during his sermon. Bahadir was then surprised when Khan suggested that she should run to become a mosque's board member, but began considering the idea more seriously after finding out that someone had stolen her expensive shoes.{{Ref|MM102}} ====Zoe Zimmer's Party==== [[File:Miguel, Nakia, Kamala & Bruno.png|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir introduces herself to [[Kamran]]]] {{Quote|Mashallah!"
"What does that mean?"
"Damn!|Nakia Bahadir and [[Miguel (Student)|Miguel]]|Crushed}} Bahadir went to [[Zoe Zimmer]]'s party, where she kept being followed by [[Miguel (Student)|Miguel]], a fellow student at [[Coles Academic High School]] who had a crush on her. Once [[Kamala Khan]] and [[Bruno Carrelli]] arrived as well, Bahadir joined them, and expressed annoyance at [[Shawn]] for giving Khan alcohol. Bahadir was then impressed when [[Kamran]] dove into the pool, with both Khan and her expressing complete amazement when Kamran approached them and introduced himself. As the party ended due to the police arriving, Bahadir went into Kamran's car with Khan, Carrelli and Miguel, and tried to stop Carrelli from interrupting the conversation between Khan and Kamran who were bonding. Once they arrived at [[Circle Q]], Bahadir also made fun of Carrelli after Kamran called him "Brian" instead of Bruno.{{Ref|MM102}} ====Bathroom Conversation==== {{Quote|I also have pads. I know how weird your mom can get about tampons."
"You know what? I'm good."
"You sure? You don't sound too good. You've been acting kinda weird these past couple of days. You know you can tell me anything, right?|Nakia Bahadir and [[Kamala Khan]]|Crushed}} Later at [[Coles Academic High School|school]], after a history class that left her upset since she thought it was unfair how little study time was dedicated to the study of civilizations other than Ancient Greeks and Romans, Bahadir noticed [[Kamala Khan]] quickly leaving class to the bathroom. Thinking that she had a period-related issue, Bahadir went to the bathroom as well and handed over a tampon to Khan, unaware that her friend actually was hiding because her powers were manifesting out of her control. [[File:Nakia Bahadir (Coles High School Women's Bathroom).png|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir tells [[Kamala Khan]] about her way of life]] As Bahadir noticed that Khan's behavior seemed a little strange in the past few days, Khan, who had left her toilet stall, explained how admirative she was of Bahadir's ability to reconcile her American lifestyle and her Muslim faith. Bahadir replied that it was anything but easy, but that she had managed to find some purpose, which had eventually caused her to embrace Khan's idea to run for mosque board. Both girls stated how they loved each other and, knowing that Bahadir had a date with [[Kamran]], Bahadir gave her a scarf and a pair of earrings, causing Khan to hug her.{{Ref|MM102}} ===Mosque Board Member=== ====Eid al-Adha==== [[File:Nakia Bahadir & Yusuf Khan.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir speaks with [[Yusuf Khan]]]] {{Quote|You wouldn't rob two young women of that future, would you, Uncle? I mean, come on, this is [[Kamala Khan|Kamala]] and me. Your daughter and basically your other daughter. Women's suffrage, we fought for this, people died for this. You wouldn't... You wouldn't kill our dreams, would you? Vote for Nakia. Eid Mubarak.|Nakia Bahadir to [[Yusuf Khan]]|Crushed}} Bahadir went to a party given at the [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City]] to celebrate Eid, hoping that she could make her case to the local community to be appointed as a board member to the mosque. She was able to secure a vote from [[Najaf]], noticing how little she enjoyed this kind of political action, before being joined by [[Kamala Khan]] and [[Bruno Carrelli]]. Bahadir gave them some tracts to deliver to other people while she approached her main target: [[Yusuf Khan]], Kamala's father and the best friend of Bahadir's main rival, [[Rasheed]]. Using her speech skills, mentioning her friendship to Kamala and how becoming a board member would be a success for everyone, Bahadir was able to convince Yusuf to at least consider voting for her, much to Rasheed's surprise.{{Ref|MM102}} ====Damage Control Visit==== [[File:Nakia Bahadir and Sheikh Abdullah.png|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir confronts [[Sadie Deever]]]] {{Quote|Pursuant to U.S. criminal code, law enforcement officers are not permitted to enter a private space without a signed warrant."
"Yeah? You studied the criminal code in homeroom?"
"''{{WPS|Law & Order}}'' re-runs, but I'm not wrong.|Nakia Bahadir and [[Sadie Deever]]|Destined}} Thanks to her successful campaign, Bahadir became a board member for the [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City]], although it took some vote counting to make sure that she had won. As such, she was present at the mosque when a group of [[Damage Control]] agents led by [[Sadie Deever]] arrived in the mosque and asked questions about [[Night Light]], who they suspected to be operating from the mosque despite [[Abdullah]]'s denial. As the operatives intended on searching the mosque, Bahadir pointed out that they had no official warrant for that and thus no legal authority to proceed, causing Deever and her men to reluctantly leave the mosque. [[File:Nakia criticizes Night Light.png|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir voices her criticism of [[Night Light]]]] Shaken by this encounter, Bahadir went to visit [[Kamala Khan]] and, upon seeing that Khan was watching videos of Night Light, she narrated her interaction with Damage Control. Ignoring that Night Light and Khan were the same person, Bahadir criticized the former, stating that she was being negligent when it came to the consequences of her actions as it drew much undesired attention upon the local Muslim community. Bahadir then told Khan that she had been appointed as a board member of the mosque, causing the two girls to share a hug to celebrate.{{Ref|MM103}} ====Aamir Khan's Wedding==== [[File:Walima Women Dancing.png|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir dancing at [[Aamir Khan]]'s wedding]] {{Quote|This whole time it was you, and you didn't say anything?|Nakia Bahadir to [[Kamala Khan]]|Destined}} As a very good friend of the Khan family, Bahadir was invited to the wedding of [[Kamala Khan]]'s brother [[Aamir Khan|Aamir]]. She joined the ''mehndi'' at the [[Khan Residence]], teaching some girls how to dance, before attending the ceremony and the party afterwards. During the party, after making fun of [[Bruno Carrelli]] befriending [[Ruby (Auntie)|Ruby]], Bahadir took part in the dance show meant for Aamir and [[Tyesha Hillman]], dancing along Kamala, Carrelli and Ruby and joking about how Hillman looked surprise when her husband participated in the dance as well. [[File:Nakia finds out Kamala is Night Light.png|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir finds out that [[Kamala Khan]] is [[Night Light]]]] Bahadir then kept dancing and having fun with the other guests until the fire alarm was triggered, causing Bahadir to leave the building with the Khan family. After a few moments, Bahadir noticed that neither Kamala nor Carrelli were at her side and went to look for them. She arrived just in time to see them [[Attack on Kamala Khan|exit the building]] through a backdoor, with Carrelli being visibly hurt and Kamala closing the door with her newfound powers. Understanding that Kamala was Night Light, Bahadir was upset that she had not been told something this important, but Kamala promptly left on Carrelli's instructions, leaving Bahadir with no choice but to take care of Carrelli herself.{{Ref|MM103}} ====[[Chase of Kamran]]==== {{Quote|You can't hide in a [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City|mosque]]!"
"Why? Houses of worship are supposed to offer sanctuary."
"This is a mosque in [[United States of America|America]]. [[Damage Control]], [[Jersey City Police Department|JCPD]], hell, Department of Sanitation probably has us under surveillance.|Nakia Bahadir and [[Bruno Carrelli]]|No Normal}} Bahadir resented [[Kamala Khan]] for not telling her that she actually was [[Night Light]], to the point that she refused to answer Khan's messages.{{Ref|MM104}} However, upon learning about the destruction of [[Circle Q]] caused by a [[Stark Industries Combat Drones|drone]] sent after [[Kamran]] by [[Damage Control]], she called the Khan family and asked Khan whether she knew about [[Bruno Carrelli]]'s whereabouts. Even though Khan knew nothing about the incident, Bahadir soon saw Carrelli and Kamran arriving together at the [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City]], seeking refuge. Bahadir explained that the mosque was not a safe place for them to hide, and instead advised them to go to [[Coles Academic High School]], where she would guide Khan. Bahadir then had to deal with a second irruption of Damage Control at the mosque. Upon seeing [[Sadie Deever]] get close to a room, Bahadir tried to get her away from it, but eventually agreed to open it, thus revealing that only [[Miguel (Student)|Miguel]], who she introduced as her boyfriend, was in there.{{Ref|MM106}} ====[[Battle at Coles Academic High School]]==== {{Quote|So, we're gonna stop [[Damage Control]] with softballs?|Nakia Bahadir to [[Ms. Marvel]]|No Normal}} Bahadir later made her way to [[Coles Academic High School|school]], where she was reunited with [[Kamala Khan]], now embracing her [[Ms. Marvel]] identity. Bahadir initially acted bitter towards Khan, who explained that she had feared that Bahadir would hate her and admitted that she should have done things differently. As the two girls began to reconcile, Bahadir decided to stood alongside Ms. Marvel against [[Damage Control]], as she resented them far more due to their incursions into her [[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City|mosque]]. She was then surprised when their group received the support of their classmate [[Zoe Zimmer]], and later Khan's own brother [[Aamir Khan|Aamir]]. [[File:Zoe Zimmer & Nakia Bahadir.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir and [[Zoe Zimmer]] discuss [[Ms. Marvel]]'s powers]] Bahadir helped the group prepare their defense against Damage Control, teaming up with Zimmer to collect a vast amount of softballs which they would later use as non-lethal projectiles against the Damage Control operatives. While waiting for the assault, Bahadir discussed the fact that Zimmer knew about Khan's powers and had kept the information for herself, which actually impressed Bahadir. As the battle began, Bahadir disguised as a decoy to distract the Damage Control agents, making them believe that they were [[Kamran]] who they were after. Thanks to the softballs prepared by Bahadir and Zimmer, as well as the fire extinguishers previously collected by the group, Bahadir and her friends were able to distract the agents for a significant amount of time. However, their efforts were eventually thwarted and Bahadir was arrested alongside Aamir, Zimmer and [[Bruno Carrelli]], and placed into a car. [[File:Bruno, Aamir, Zoe & Nakia.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Bahadir watches [[Ms. Marvel]] fight against [[Damage Control]]]] Due to this predicament, Bahadir was unable to assist Ms. Marvel as she defended Kamran against Damage Control. She initially feared for her friend's life, but was later amazed when Ms. Marvel achieved a new level of control over her powers. However, situation became dangerous for Bahadir as Kamran lost control of his, causing massive crystalline light spikes to protrude through the van Bahadir was still locked in, nearly hurting her. Nevertheless, the situation was defused by Ms. Marvel, who helped Kamran to calm down and evade Damage Control. Having been released, Bahadir joined the crowd to stand between Ms. Marvel and Damage Control, buying the former enough time to escape as well. In the aftermath of the battle, Bahadir and Carrelli helped Kamran get out of the country, reclaiming his car which they took to meet with Khan. As Carrelli remained to speak in private with Khan, Bahadir, who complimented Carrelli upon his admission into [[Caltech]], stealthily stole the car keys from him and waited for her friends to get into the car as well. She then began to drive the car for a ride through [[Jersey City]]. Bahadir also appeared in a {{WPS|TikTok}} video from Zimmer in which they celebrated their victory and Zimmer declared herself an ally of Bahadir's cause.{{Ref|MM106}} ==Facilities== *'''[[Coles Academic High School]]''': Bahadir attended classes in this [[New Jersey]] high school, where she would frequently be seen alongside her best friends [[Kamala Khan]] and [[Bruno Carrelli]]. She also became friends with [[Zoe Zimmer]], one of the school's most popular students due to her online fame. *'''[[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City]]''': Bahadir frequently attended lectures and sermons at this mosque and, upon being suggested to do so by [[Kamala Khan]], she decided to become one of its board members and was successful in her attempt. She later used her position to defend the mosque and its followers from the incursions of [[Damage Control]]. Bahadir also once hid her "boyfriend" [[Miguel (Student)|Miguel]] in the mosque out of fear that her mother would find out about him. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *Father *Mother ===Allies=== *[[Coles Academic High School]] **[[Ms. Marvel|Kamala Khan/Ms. Marvel]] - Classmate and Best Friend **[[Zoe Zimmer]] - Friend **[[Miguel (Student)|Miguel]] **[[Paul (Student)|Paul]] **[[Shawn]] *[[Bruno Carrelli]] - Friend *[[Zoe Zimmer]]'s Mother *[[Yusuf Khan]] *[[Muneeba Khan]] *[[Aamir Khan]] *[[Islamic Masjid of Jersey City]] **[[Abdullah]] **[[Rasheed]] *[[Najaf]] *[[Kamran]] *[[Zara]] *[[Ruby (Auntie)|Ruby]] *[[Tyesha Hillman]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Damage Control|United States Department of Damage Control]] **[[Sadie Deever]] **[[Barrie]] {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|MM101}} *{{Appearance|MM102}} *{{Appearance|MM103}} *{{Appearance|MM104}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|MM106}} *{{Appearance|TM}} (photo & mentioned) ==Trivia== *In the comics, Nakia Bahadir is [[Kamala Khan]]'s classmate of [[Turkey|Turkish]] descent and her closest friend. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Dena Sodano]] was a stunt double for [[Yasmeen Fletcher]] in the role of Nakia Bahadir. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External Links== {{Gallery|Nakia Bahadir/Gallery}} *{{Marvel|Nakia Bahadir (Earth-616)|Nakia Bahadir}} [[es:Nakia Bahadir]] [[pt-br:Nakia Bahadir]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Ms. Marvel (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Students]] [[Category:Coles Academic High School Students]]
